name: DT Ontology (Decision Tree — Extensibility Pattern Evaluation)
description: Hypothesis-testing decision tree for evaluating extensibility patterns (Agent, Skill, Plugin, Cowork Plugin) within the Claude ecosystem. 7 hypothesis gates across 3 evaluation layers with weighted scoring route to 12 terminal recommendations.

components.entities: EvaluationLayer, HypothesisGate, EvaluationCriterion, GateThreshold, Recommendation, AutomationDecisionRecord, TestScenario
components.relationships: 20 relationships including gate routing (12), layer containment (3), traversal/outcome (2), validation (1), cross-ontology (2)
components.businessRules: 15 rules (12 mandatory, 3 advisory) — scoring formula, threshold tiers, sequential evaluation, reset cascade
components.crossSeriesBridges: PE (pe:AIAgent via agent-tier recommendations), VSOM (strategic objective alignment)

crossOntology.description: Decision records link to strategic objectives

notes: v1.0.0: Initial release for F40.1 Extensibility Decision Tree Engine. Source data from PBS/STRATEGY/extensibility-decision-tree-v1.0.json. Visualiser integration as new decision-tree view mode with interactive scoring panel.
